ai_summary.one_liner: UMI + 2g CoinFT 6-axis sensors on each finger for in-the-wild force-aware compliant manipulation learning
ai_summary.problem: Contact-rich manipulation requires force modulation but commercial F/T sensors are too expensive/bulky for in-the-wild data collection
ai_summary.solution: CoinFT per-finger sensors + Adaptive Compliance Policy predicting position, grasp force, and stiffness simultaneously via 3 parallel control loops
ai_summary.key_result: Whiteboard wiping 92%, zucchini skewering 80% (in-the-wild: 100%), lightbulb insertion 95% — overwhelming advantage over force-unaware baselines

research_gaps.question: 3개의 비교적 단순한 1팔 접촉 과제에서만 검증되었으며, 양팔 협응이나 변형체 조작의 복합 과제로의 확장은 미검증
